metadata.title: SalonBook.az — online booking 24/7
metadata.description: Let your clients book online themselves, 24/7. Create a personal booking link for your salon and share it.

Footer.tagline: Online booking for salons, barbershops and clinics in Azerbaijan. Let clients book themselves — 24/7.

privacy.metaDescription: How SalonBook.az collects, uses and protects personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.contactLine: For questions and requests: WhatsApp {wa} or the contact channels on the site.

sections.title: 1. General information
body: SalonBook.az (the “Platform”) is an online booking service for salons, barbershops and clinics. This policy explains what personal data is collected, how it is used and how it is protected when using the Platform. By using the Platform, you agree to this policy.

items: Salon account data: email address, name, salon name and salon profile data (address, phone, business hours, services, staff). Passwords are stored only as a one-way hash.
Customer data: the name, phone number and chosen appointment details (service, staff, date and time) entered during online booking.
Technical data: IP address, session cookie and similar technical records for security and abuse prevention.

sections.title: 3. Purposes of data use

items: To provide the online booking and appointment management service;
To send appointment-related notifications via WhatsApp (booking confirmation, reminder before the appointment, new-booking alert to the salon);
To keep the account secure and prevent abuse;
To show the salon owner statistics about their activity.

body: WhatsApp notifications are only transactional, appointment-related messages — no advertising or marketing messages are sent to your phone number.

sections.title: 4. Data sharing
body: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Data is shared only where necessary to provide the service:

items: Meta Platforms (WhatsApp Business API) — the phone number and message content are transmitted to deliver notification messages;
Hosting and database providers — data is stored on secure servers so the Platform can operate;
Authorized government bodies where required by law.

body: Customer data is visible only to the salon where they booked — one salon's data is not accessible to other salons.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
body: The Platform uses only essential cookies: the cookie that keeps your session after logging in and interface preferences (e.g. theme). No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

sections.title: 6. Data retention and security
body: Data is kept while the account is active. Data transmission is encrypted with HTTPS, passwords are protected with a hashing algorithm, and database access is restricted.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
body: You have the right to access, correct or request deletion of your personal data. To do so, contact us via the channel below — requests are answered within a reasonable time.

sections.title: 8. Changes
body: This policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes are published on this page and the “Last updated” date is updated.

terms.metaDescription: The rules and conditions for using the SalonBook.az platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.contactLine: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan. For questions: WhatsApp {wa}.

privacyLink.before: The rules for collecting and using personal data are described separately in the

sections.title: 1. Service description
body: SalonBook.az is an online booking platform for salons, barbershops and clinics: customers book appointments themselves through the salon's page, while the salon manages appointments via a calendar and receives/sends WhatsApp notifications. By using the Platform, you agree to these terms.

items: You must provide accurate and up-to-date information to create an account;
You are responsible for protecting your account's login credentials;
The salon is responsible for the accuracy of the information it publishes on its page (services, prices, business hours);
The salon is responsible for using its customers' phone numbers only for appointment-related notifications and for having customer consent to do so.

sections.title: 3. Prohibited use

items: Creating false bookings or bookings in someone else's name;
Using the Platform to send spam or unwanted messages;
Interfering with the Platform's operation or sending automated bulk requests;
Using it for any activity that violates the law.

body: Accounts that break these rules may be suspended or deleted without notice.

sections.title: 4. Plans and payment
body: The Platform operates with a free trial period and paid plans. Current prices are shown in the “Pricing” section of the site and are calculated in AZN. Payments are currently accepted directly (manually) — contact us for details. Plans may be changed with prior notice.

sections.title: 5. WhatsApp notifications
body: Booking confirmations and reminders are sent via the WhatsApp Business API (Meta Platforms). Message delivery depends on Meta's service and the Platform does not fully guarantee delivery. No reminders are sent for cancelled appointments.

sections.title: 6. Service availability and limitation of liability
body: We make reasonable efforts to keep the Platform running continuously, but the service is provided “as is”. The Platform is not liable for losses arising from technical outages, the downtime of third-party services (hosting, WhatsApp) or force-majeure events. The Platform is not a party to the relationship between the salon and the customer (service quality, payment, etc.).

sections.title: 8. Changes and termination
body: These terms may be updated from time to time; continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. You may close your account at any time — contact us to do so.

Landing.heroSubtitle: A professional booking and management platform for your salon. Clients book themselves 24/7, WhatsApp reminders go out automatically — and there are no commissions on bookings.
Landing.heroImageAlt: SalonBook.az online booking page — choosing service, staff and a time slot

features.title: Everything you need for bookings
features.subtitle: Simple tools that stop the messaging, fill the chair and keep your team in sync.

booking.title: 24/7 online booking
booking.body: Clients pick a free slot and book themselves, day or night — no need for you.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp reminders
whatsapp.body: Automatic confirmation and reminder messages — fewer no-shows.

overlap.title: Double-booking protection
overlap.body: Overlapping appointments for the same staff member are impossible — enforced at the database level.

team.title: Team and services
team.body: Separate working hours per staff member, service durations and buffer time between them.

slots.title: Smart free slots
slots.body: Available slots are computed precisely in real time, based on duration and buffer.

roi.title: ROI analytics
roi.body: Revenue earned from online bookings, returning clients and your most profitable services — at a glance, on every plan.

steps.title: Get started in three steps
steps.subtitle: Setup takes minutes. No technical knowledge required.

profile.title: Build your profile
profile.body: Add services, staff and working hours — in just a few minutes.

share.title: Share your link
share.body: Put your personal booking link in your Instagram bio or on WhatsApp.

accept.title: Accept bookings
accept.body: Your calendar fills automatically, reminders send themselves. You focus on the work.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial. A fixed monthly subscription — no hidden fees, no commissions.
pricing.footnote: Money-back guarantee during your first paid month. All prices are in AZN; payments are currently activated manually.

salon.name: Salon
salon.note: Money-back guarantee in your first paid month

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Didn't find what you were looking for? Write to us — we'll help.

finalCta.title: Create your booking link today
finalCta.subtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial — no card required. Set it up in minutes, share it with your clients and watch the bookings come in on their own.

items.a: Create your salon, add services, staff and working hours. You get a personal link — share it in your Instagram bio or on WhatsApp. Clients open the link, pick a free slot and book themselves.

items.q: Do clients need to install an app?
items.a: No. The booking page is an ordinary web link — it opens in a browser on a phone or computer. No download or account required.
A booking confirmation and a reminder before the appointment are sent automatically. Messages are delivered by a separate background service — so booking itself never waits.
Two confirmed appointments for the same staff member can never overlap — this is enforced at the database level. Even if two people pick the same time at once, only one goes through.

items.q: How do I get started — is there a free trial?
items.a: Yes. You start with a 14-day free trial — no card required. When it ends you pick the plan that fits you (Start, Salon or Pro) and continue. If you're not happy during your first paid month, we'll refund you.

A fixed monthly subscription — with no commissions on bookings. Annual billing is also available. Payments are currently manual: you pick your plan, we activate it. Automatic online payments and deposits (no-show protection) are in the works for Pro.
